name: io.github.brs077/cncjs-mcp
title: CNCjs MCP Server
description: MCP server for CNC machine control, G-code generation, woodworking project planning, and CAD/CAM automation via CNCjs and GRBL. Includes 62+ tools for machine operation, joinery, cut lists, materials lists, schematics, design file generation, and Fusion 360/FreeCAD/Illustrator integration.

environmentVariables.name: CNCJS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: CNCjs JWT authentication token (if access control is enabled)
